items.name: event-calendar
items.title: Headless-first event calendar with month, week, day, N-day and agenda views, external CRUD contract, and a subscribable store.
items.description: Headless-first event calendar with month, week, day, N-day and agenda views, external CRUD contract, and a subscribable store.

items.name: event-calendar-agenda-view
items.title: Chronological agenda grouped by day - a day header row plus a clean time / dot / title table.
items.description: Chronological agenda grouped by day - a day header row plus a clean time / dot / title table.

items.name: event-calendar-content
items.title: Active-view switchboard rendering month, week, day, N-days, or agenda; swappable per view via the components prop.
items.description: Active-view switchboard rendering month, week, day, N-days, or agenda; swappable per view via the components prop.

items.name: event-calendar-dnd
items.title: Custom pointer-event interaction engine - move, resize, and drag-create across month, week, day, and N-day views with live validation.
items.description: Custom pointer-event interaction engine - move, resize, and drag-create across month, week, day, and N-day views with live validation.

items.name: event-calendar-event
items.title: The reusable event chip/bar/block - selection, clicks, drag + resize wiring, and the consumer render slot.
items.description: The reusable event chip/bar/block - selection, clicks, drag + resize wiring, and the consumer render slot.

items.name: event-calendar-i18n
items.title: Default UI texts, date-format strings, and formatter functions for the event calendar, fully overridable per key.
items.description: Default UI texts, date-format strings, and formatter functions for the event calendar, fully overridable per key.

items.name: event-calendar-lib
items.title: Pure, React-free calendar math: view ranges, zoned day keys, multi-day segmentation, overlap packing, lane packing, and the event index.
items.description: Pure, React-free calendar math: view ranges, zoned day keys, multi-day segmentation, overlap packing, lane packing, and the event index.

items.name: event-calendar-month-view
items.title: ARIA-grid month view with week rows, day cells, event chips, and overflow counts.
items.description: ARIA-grid month view with week rows, day cells, event chips, and overflow counts.

items.name: event-calendar-nav
items.title: Composable navigation - Today, prev/next, period title, view switcher dropdown, and a free toolbar slot.
items.description: Composable navigation - Today, prev/next, period title, view switcher dropdown, and a free toolbar slot.

items.name: event-calendar-recurrence
items.title: RFC 5545 subset recurrence expansion for the event calendar - structured rules or raw RRULE strings, with a hard occurrence cap.
items.description: RFC 5545 subset recurrence expansion for the event calendar - structured rules or raw RRULE strings, with a hard occurrence cap.

items.name: event-calendar-resource-view
items.title: Resource-columns day grid for booking scenarios - one time axis, one column per resource, full drag, resize, and drag-create.
items.description: Resource-columns day grid for booking scenarios - one time axis, one column per resource, full drag, resize, and drag-create.

items.name: event-calendar-time-grid
items.title: Shared week/day/N-days engine - hour gutter, minute-positioned events, all-day row, drag ghosts, now indicator, and configurable scrolling.
items.description: Shared week/day/N-days engine - hour gutter, minute-positioned events, all-day row, drag ghosts, now indicator, and configurable scrolling.

items.name: event-calendar-types
items.title: Public TypeScript contract for the headless event calendar: events, occurrences, segments, state, and callbacks.
items.description: Public TypeScript contract for the headless event calendar: events, occurrences, segments, state, and callbacks.
